title: Give Me Hats!
description: A hat mod for fabric 1.15-1.21.5 and forge 1.18-1.19 most hats have cool effects. Hats go in Trinkets or Curios slots
body:
# Give Me Hats! ![Hatgif](https://i.ibb.co/q5g8pYS/ezgif-4-6f643d5374.gif) Give Me Hats is a hat mod, that adds hats. Most of the hats have specially abilities, some just look cool Hats go in the 'hat' slot in both [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) and Curios (not on Modrinth), depending on if you are on Fabric or Forge respectively. ### Hats: **Sailor**: makes you go faster in a boat **Slime**: makes you bounce on landing **Bowler**: makes you walk faster **Cowboy**: Makes you travel faster on a horse **Santa**: frost walker but more consistent **Floating**: A slow fall hat **Bunny ears**: jump boost **Deerstalker hat**: makes mobs nearby glow when sneaking (Flappy_McChicken) **Cat ears**: scares creepers when sneaking (UwU) **Fox ears**: freezes animals when sneaking (Fox!) **Electric mouse ears**: drops a lighting bolt when attacking any mob in rain! (secrettrainer472) **Russian hat**: removes status effects if you have more than one **Dome of the Strider**: fire resistance, nice. (Nam Etag fabric discord) **Woolrus Hat**: Dolphins Grace and Nightvision whilst swimming (N/A) **Space Helmet**: Supplies oxygen to the wearer, even underwater! (Psylent) **Leprechaun hat**: grants the user some luck after sneaking (only works on fishing though) (TheIrishStud) **Golem Bucket**: on hitting an entity they get thrown upward (Sheepking186) **Wolf Ears**: hitting a sheep shears it (Alphie_U on Twitch) **Protagonist hat**: gives enemies weakness when hit (although I want it to make it so enemies don't have Iframes) (me lol) **Witches Brim**: has a chance to give slowness, mining fatigue or poison on punching an enemy (quite a few people suggested this) **Dwarven helm**: gives hast 3 when below y=20 (GasStationGuy but also likely others) **Viking helmet**: gives night vision in boats and strength in rain (GasStationGuy but also likely others) **Awesome shades**: gives you night vision (with particles) on sneaking, and turns any punched sheep into a jeb_ sheep (BunnieWitch) **Halo**: does an extra 4 damage per hit to each undead mob (ghostwing) The **Top Hat, Tippity-Top Tophat, lil tater, Fez and crown** are Aesthetic only right now.

You can submit hat ideas [on this google form](https://forms.gle/eqQKG38b4Hadni486) Translations, at various points, where create by these fine people: Chinese (zh_cn) - qsefthuopq Russian (ru_ru) - OneGameKoTT Ukraine (uk_ua) - OneGameKoTT
